purpose: Verify package version is published to npm.

package.description: Package name. Defaults to package.json name.

version.description: Package version. Defaults to package.json version.

goal.description: Managed goal id to report publish evidence to.

evidence.description: Evidence key to set on the goal. Default packagePublished.

success: verify-package-published completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: verify-package-published cannot return a valid canonical result
